creator: danfe@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Daniel Engberg from comment #9)
> Shouldn't it also use c++17-lang?
Technically this won't hurt, but since our system compiler supports C++17 across the universe these days, it's actually a no-op.  Previously it was required because we've been still with GCC 4.2 e.g. on PowerPC and MIPS, while on modern Clang everywhere else.
